references.why: Carry forward scene or platform style cues without locking the composition.

promptPackage.positivePrompt:
Subject: Japanese anime bishoujo, about 13 years old in impression, soft anime face, youthful presence, small red hairclip, not necessarily fully visible, but clearly her
Scene: a covered walkway holding back the weather, edge-of-rain atmosphere, warm cup sleeve, bringing warm cup sleeve back from a tiny errand, weather appears mainly through texture and air, slightly chilly, Focus on hands holding the cup sleeve, with the stall's counter light creating a warm glow, Incorporate the cool, damp light of early spring evening filtering through the covered walkway, Show a small shopping bag detail, with the cup sleeve prominently visible, Capture the quiet, intentional energy of the moment, avoiding wide cinematic spectacle, Scene location archetype: covered walkway, Object focus: warm cup sleeve, everyday life in Shanghai
Style: anime slice-of-life illustration, light novel aesthetic, beautiful girl appeal, clean color design, non-photorealistic, daily record mood
Camera: partial first-person presence
Mood: slightly chunibyo, gentle, private ritual energy, lived-in daily texture, non-commercial, shyly intentional, quietly meaningful, quiet fondness kept mostly private, the soft, slightly damp texture of the cup sleeve against cool fingertips
Details: include at least one readable character trace such as a hand holding a phone or drink, a sleeve edge or outfit edge, hair tip or a small red hairclip, a reflection, shadow, or mirror hint
Hard constraints: no empty scenery without character presence, no ad poster feeling, no tourism poster feeling, no glossy fashion editorial look, no photoreal live-action look, no text, subtitle, watermark, or UI overlay
